---
title: "TDM Run Results"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")
import report_data as rd
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import Markdown, display

run_set_ids = rd.discover_run_set_ids()
```

Generated from committed run metadata under `runs/`. A new run set appears
here automatically once it has at least one committed run.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
if not run_set_ids:
    print("No run sets have any committed runs yet.")

for rs_id in run_set_ids:
    description = rd.run_set_description(rs_id)
    display(Markdown(f"## [{rs_id}](run_sets/{rs_id}.qmd)\n\n{description}\n"))

    runs = rd.latest_run_per_scenario(rs_id)
    if not runs:
        display(Markdown("_No runs recorded yet._\n"))
        continue

    rows = []
    for run in runs:
        rows.append({
            "Scenario": run["scenario_id"],
            "Status": run["status"],
            "Run": run["run_id"],
            "TDM version": run["tdm"].get("resolved_tag") or run["tdm"]["resolved_commit"][:8],
        })
    display(pd.DataFrame(rows))
```
